name: IDBI Aspire Platinum Credit Card
features: Visa network, lifetime-free entry-tier card
2 Delight Points on every ₹150 of eligible spend
1% fuel-surcharge waiver on ₹400–₹4,000 fuel transactions, capped at ₹300 per month
Zero lost-card liability
Up to ~48 days of interest-free credit
display_disclaimer: This is a preliminary eligibility check, not an approval. IDBI Bank makes the final credit decision.

name: IDBI Royale Signature Credit Card
features: Visa network, lifetime-free upper-mid tier card
3 Delight Points on every ₹100 of eligible spend
1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per quarter
₹25L air-accident insurance cover
display_disclaimer: This is a preliminary eligibility check, not an approval. IDBI Bank makes the final credit decision.

name: IDBI Euphoria World Credit Card
features: Mastercard network, premium travel tier card
6 Delight Points on every ₹100 of eligible travel spend
3 Delight Points on every ₹100 of other eligible spend
12 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
₹25L air-accident insurance cover
1% fuel surcharge waiver on ₹500–₹4,000 fuel transactions
fees: Annual fee: ₹1,499 from the second year
display_disclaimer: This is a preliminary eligibility check, not an approval. IDBI Bank makes the final credit decision.

name: IDBI Winnings Credit Card
features: RuPay network, lifetime-free rewards tier card for Indian citizens
2 Delight Points on every ₹100 of eligible spend
10% welcome cashback up to ₹500
Domestic and international lounge visits
₹10L accidental cover
display_disclaimer: This is a preliminary eligibility check, not an approval. IDBI Bank makes the final credit decision.

name: IDBI Imperium Platinum Secured Credit Card
features: Visa network, secured against an eligible IDBI Fixed Deposit
Credit limit up to 85% of the linked Fixed Deposit
70% cash-withdrawal sublimit
2 Delight Points on every ₹150 of eligible spend
No income proof or credit-score dependency
Up to ~48 days of interest-free credit
Open to NRIs against an eligible IDBI FCNR/NRE deposit
display_disclaimer: An eligible IDBI Fixed Deposit must be confirmed before this card can be considered. Final approval remains with IDBI Bank.

name: IDBI Personal Loan
features: Digital journey for eligible existing salaried customers
Loan amount and tenure are subject to credit assessment
display_disclaimer: The demo does not hold the banking-relationship and underwriting data needed for a personal-loan pre-check.

name: IDBI Home Loan
features: For purchase, construction, extension, improvement or balance transfer
Repayment capacity and property details are assessed by IDBI Bank
display_disclaimer: The demo does not hold property and repayment-capacity data needed for a home-loan pre-check.

name: Tata AIG Medicare
display_disclaimer: Insurance is distributed by IDBI Bank under non-risk participation; purchase is voluntary and subject to insurer terms.
